news.paragraph: McDonald's has entered into a major stadium naming rights partnership with Chicago Fire FC, which includes plans for a new venue to open in 2028. While the company recently reported better-than-expected first-quarter results, RBC Capital has trimmed its price target for the stock. Traders should weigh these long-term brand expansion efforts against recent analyst adjustments following the Q1 performance.
